deploy_validation.environment: local fkwu form-cli standard lane on macOS
deploy_validation.notes: No public HTTP deploy changed. The deployed surface for this task is the local self-contained fkwu form-cli binary and durable receipt trace.

phase_gate.reason: Mac local fkwu form-cli proof is observed, including Metal witnesses. CI, Windows, Android, full tokenizer, full GGUF weight-map-to-Metal, and autoregressive ask binding remain unproven and are not claimed.

evidence_refs: Form-first reasoning was attempted through form-cli ask before rented analysis; local fkwu RAG returned no grounded hit for the GGUF/model-cell implementation question, so OpenAI GPT-5 Codex acted as the rented reasoning layer while local fkwu carried proof.
Runtime proof: receipt shows owner=fkwu-form-cli, verb=gguf-model-cell, denied_toolchain_names_visible_on_path=0, http_or_ollama=absent.
Observed GGUF values: gguf_version=3, gguf_tensor_count=1, gguf_kv_count=2, gguf_tensor_info_offset=74, gguf_tensor_ndims=1, gguf_tensor_dim0=256, gguf_tensor_type=12, gguf_tensor_data_offset=0.

Honest non-claims: no full real Llama GGUF variable metadata walk, no full GGUF weight map materialized into Metal buffers, no tokenizer plus full-width autoregressive decode, no Android Vulkan or Windows DirectML/D3D12 execution.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: form-cli now has a native gguf-model-cell verb in the self-contained fkwu app. Given a content-addressed manifest, it verifies the GGUF bytes with Form SHA-256 and reports GGUF v3 tensor metadata without HTTP, Ollama, or a visible toolchain on PATH.
public_endpoints: local fkwu form-cli standard lane: form/form-cli
